<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Topside Roofing & Siding | Bellingham, WA</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,900;1,900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ── FONT NOTE ──
   --font-title  : Playfair Display Black (weight 900, Google Fonts)
   --font-sub    : Times New Roman (system font)
   --font-body   : Barlow (Google Fonts, UI elements)
*/
:root {
  --font-title: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
  --font-sub: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
  --font-body: 'Barlow', sans-serif;
  --fw-title: 900;
  --slate: #1a1e24;
  --slate-mid: #252b34;
  --slate-light: #343d4a;
  --steel: #8a9aab;
  --steel-light: #b8c5d0;
  --cream: #f4f0e8;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --amber: #c9820a;
  --amber-light: #e8a020;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  background: var(--cream);
  color: var(--slate);
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav {
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
  background: var(--slate);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 2.5rem; height: 64px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--amber);
}
.nav-logo {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--white); letter-spacing: .01em;
}
.nav-logo span { color: var(--amber); }
.nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
.nav-links a {
  font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--steel-light); transition: color .2s;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
.nav-cta {
  background: var(--amber); color: var(--slate) !important;
  padding: .45rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 2px;
  font-weight: 700 !important; font-family: var(--font-body) !important;
}
.nav-cta:hover { background: var(--amber-light) !important; }

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: var(--slate);
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  padding-top: 64px;
}

/* canvas for falling shingles animation */
#shingle-canvas {
  position: fixed; inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  pointer-events: none; z-index: 1;
}

.hero-left {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;
  padding: 5rem 3rem 5rem 4rem;
  position: relative; z-index: 3;
}
.hero-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
  background: rgba(201,130,10,.15);
  border: 1px solid rgba(201,130,10,.4);
  color: var(--amber-light);
  font-size: .72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase; font-family: var(--font-body);
  padding: .4rem 1rem; border-radius: 2px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem; width: fit-content;
}
.hero-badge::before {
  content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--amber-light); animation: pulse 2s infinite;
}
@keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.3} }

.hero-headline {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 5.5vw, 5rem);
  font-weight: 900; line-height: 1;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  letter-spacing: -.02em;
}
.hero-headline em {
  font-style: italic; color: var(--amber); display: block;
}
.hero-sub {
  font-family: var(--font-sub);
  font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.75;
  color: var(--steel-light); max-width: 440px;
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
}
.hero-actions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }
.btn-primary {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .75rem;
  background: var(--amber); color: var(--slate);
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .05em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; padding: 1rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 2px; width: fit-content;
  transition: background .2s, transform .15s;
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--amber-light); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn-secondary {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem;
  color: var(--steel-light); font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .85rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .05em;
  text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(138,154,171,.3);
  padding-bottom: 2px; width: fit-content;
  transition: color .2s, border-color .2s;
}
.btn-secondary:hover { color: var(--white); border-color: var(--white); }

.hero-trust {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem; padding-top: 2rem;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(138,154,171,.2);
}
.trust-stat { text-align: center; }
.trust-stat .num {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--white); line-height: 1; display: block;
}
.trust-stat .label {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .68rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--steel);
  display: block; margin-top: .2rem;
}
.trust-divider { width: 1px; height: 40px; background: rgba(138,154,171,.25); }


/* ── GYROSCOPIC BADGE ── */
.gyro-wrap {
  position: relative;
  width: 180px; height: 180px;
  margin: 0 auto 1.5rem;
  perspective: 600px;
}
.gyro-ring-outer {
  position: absolute; inset: -14px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid rgba(201,130,10,.35);
  animation: gyro-y 6s linear infinite;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
}
.gyro-ring-inner {
  position: absolute; inset: -6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(201,130,10,.2);
  animation: gyro-x 4s linear infinite;
  transform-style: preserve-3d;
}
.gyro-badge-img {
  width: 180px; height: 180px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  animation: gyro-spin 8s ease-in-out infinite;
  display: block;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(201,130,10,.4));
}
@keyframes gyro-spin {
  0%   { transform: rotateY(0deg) rotateX(6deg);  }
  25%  { transform: rotateY(15deg) rotateX(-4deg); }
  50%  { transform: rotateY(0deg) rotateX(6deg);  }
  75%  { transform: rotateY(-15deg) rotateX(-4deg); }
  100% { transform: rotateY(0deg) rotateX(6deg);  }
}
@keyframes gyro-y {
  0%   { transform: rotateY(0deg);   }
  100% { transform: rotateY(360deg); }
}
@keyframes gyro-x {
  0%   { transform: rotateX(0deg);   }
  100% { transform: rotateX(360deg); }
}

/* hero right — presidents award panel */
.hero-right {
  position: relative;
  background: transparent; z-index: 2;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.hero-right-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 2;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--slate) 0%, rgba(26,30,36,.2) 35%),
              linear-gradient(to top, var(--slate) 0%, transparent 35%);
}
.hero-credential {
  position: absolute; bottom: 3rem; right: 2.5rem; z-index: 4;
  background: rgba(26,30,36,.92);
  border: 1px solid rgba(201,130,10,.35);
  border-radius: 4px; padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem; text-align: center;
}
.hero-credential .cred-title {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .65rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--amber); display: block; margin-bottom: .4rem;
}
.hero-credential .cred-main {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--white); display: block; line-height: 1.15;
}
.hero-credential .cred-sub {
  font-family: var(--font-sub);
  font-size: .75rem; color: var(--steel); display: block; margin-top: .3rem;
}

/* ── PROOF BAR ── */
.proof-bar {
  background: var(--amber);
  padding: .9rem 2.5rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  gap: 3rem; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.proof-item {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .85rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .05em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--slate);
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem;
}
.proof-item::before { content: '✓'; }

/* ── SECTION BASE ── */
section { padding: 6rem 2.5rem; }
.section-label {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--amber); margin-bottom: .75rem;
}
.section-title {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05;
  letter-spacing: -.02em; color: var(--slate);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.section-title.light { color: var(--white); }
.section-body {
  font-family: var(--font-sub);
  font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.8;
  color: #4a5462; max-width: 600px;
}
.section-body.light { color: var(--steel-light); }
.container { max-width: 1160px; margin: 0 auto; }

/* ── SERVICES ── */
.services-section { background: var(--cream); }
.services-header { margin-bottom: 3.5rem; }
.services-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5px; background: #c8c0b0;
  border: 1.5px solid #c8c0b0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
}
.service-card {
  background: var(--white);
  padding: 2rem 1.75rem; cursor: default;
  transition: background .2s;
}
.service-card:hover { background: var(--slate); }
.service-card:hover .svc-name,
.service-card:hover .svc-desc { color: var(--white); }
.service-card:hover .svc-icon { color: var(--amber); }
.service-card:hover .svc-link { opacity: 1; }
.svc-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: var(--amber); display: block; transition: color .2s; }
.svc-name {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--slate); margin-bottom: .5rem;
  letter-spacing: -.01em; transition: color .2s;
}
.svc-desc {
  font-family: var(--font-sub);
  font-size: .88rem; line-height: 1.65;
  color: #5a6475; transition: color .2s;
}
.svc-link {
  display: block; margin-top: 1rem;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase; text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--amber); opacity: 0; transition: opacity .2s;
}

/* ── WHY US ── */
.why-section { background: var(--slate); }
.why-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center; }
.why-list { list-style: none; margin-top: 2rem; }
.why-item {
  display: flex; gap: 1.25rem; align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(138,154,171,.15);
}
.why-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(138,154,171,.15); }
.why-num {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: rgba(201,130,10,.2); line-height: 1; min-width: 3rem;
}
.why-text-head {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--white); margin-bottom: .35rem; letter-spacing: -.01em;
}
.why-text-body {
  font-family: var(--font-sub);
  font-size: .88rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--steel);
}
.why-stat-stack {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.5px;
  background: rgba(138,154,171,.1);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(138,154,171,.15);
  border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
}
.why-stat-card { background: var(--slate-mid); padding: 2.5rem 2rem; text-align: center; }
.why-stat-num {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--amber); line-height: 1; display: block;
}
.why-stat-label {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--steel); margin-top: .5rem; display: block;
}
.why-stat-card.featured {
  background: var(--amber); grid-column: 1 / -1;
  padding: 1.75rem 2rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem;
}
.why-stat-card.featured .why-stat-num { color: var(--slate); font-size: 2.5rem; }
.why-stat-card.featured .why-stat-label { color: rgba(26,30,36,.7); }
.gaf-badge {
  background: var(--slate); border-radius: 3px;
  padding: .6rem 1.2rem;
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--amber); white-space: nowrap;
}

/* ── AREAS ── */
.areas-section { background: var(--cream); }
.areas-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem; margin-top: 2.5rem;
}
.area-pill {
  background: var(--white);
  border: 1.5px solid #d8d0c4; border-radius: 2px;
  padding: .75rem 1rem;
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: .95rem; font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--slate); text-align: center;
  transition: border-color .2s, background .2s;
}
.area-pill:hover { border-color: var(--amber); background: rgba(201,130,10,.05); }

/* ── CTA ── */
.cta-section {
  background: var(--slate); text-align: center;
  padding: 5rem 2.5rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.cta-section::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: .03;
  background: repeating-linear-gradient(
    45deg, transparent, transparent 20px,
    rgba(255,255,255,.5) 20px, rgba(255,255,255,.5) 21px
  );
}
.cta-phone {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 5rem);
  font-weight: 900; color: var(--amber);
  text-decoration: none; display: block;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 .75rem; transition: color .2s;
}
.cta-phone:hover { color: var(--amber-light); }
.cta-note {
  font-family: var(--font-sub);
  font-size: .88rem; color: var(--steel);
}
.cta-or {
  font-family: var(--font-sub); font-style: italic;
  color: var(--steel); margin: 1.5rem 0; display: block;
}
.btn-outline {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(201,130,10,.5); color: var(--amber-light);
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; padding: .8rem 2rem; border-radius: 2px;
  transition: background .2s, border-color .2s;
}
.btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(201,130,10,.1); border-color: var(--amber); }

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer {
  background: #12151a; padding: 3rem 2.5rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem;
}
.footer-logo {
  font-family: var(--font-title);
  font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 900; color: var(--white);
}
.footer-logo span { color: var(--amber); }
.footer-links { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; list-style: none; }
.footer-links a {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; color: var(--steel); transition: color .2s;
}
.footer-links a:hover { color: var(--white); }
.footer-copy { font-family: var(--font-sub); font-size: .78rem; color: #4a5260; }

/* ── HERO ENTRY ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
.hero-badge    { animation: fadeUp .6s ease both; }
.hero-headline { animation: fadeUp .7s .1s ease both; }
.hero-sub      { animation: fadeUp .7s .2s ease both; }
.hero-actions  { animation: fadeUp .7s .3s ease both; }
.hero-trust    { animation: fadeUp .7s .4s ease both; }

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .hero { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .hero-right { display: none; }
  .hero-left { padding: 4rem 1.5rem; }
  .why-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  nav { padding: 0 1.25rem; }
  .nav-links { display: none; }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- Falling shingles canvas — fixed, spans full page -->
<canvas id="shingle-canvas"></canvas>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">Topside <span>Roofing</span> & Siding</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#why">Why Us</a></li>
    <li><a href="#areas">Areas</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
    <li><a href="tel:3607522220" class="nav-cta">(360) 752-2220</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">

  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="gyro-wrap" style="display:none">
      <div class="gyro-ring-outer"></div>
      <div class="gyro-ring-inner"></div>
      <img class="gyro-badge-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="GAF President's Club Residential Award Winner">
    </div>
    <div class="hero-badge" style="display:none">GAF Master Elite® · President's Club Award Winner</div>
    <h1 class="hero-headline">
      Northwest<br>
      <em>Roofing</em>
      Done Right
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Bellingham's most trusted roofing and exterior contractor for over 35 years.
      One of fewer than 2% of contractors in the country to earn GAF Master Elite status —
      and the only President's Club winner in Whatcom County.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a href="tel:3607522220" class="btn-primary">
        <span>📞</span> Call (360) 752-2220
      </a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-secondary">Or request a free estimate →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-trust">
      <div class="trust-stat">
        <span class="num">35+</span>
        <span class="label">Years in business</span>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-divider"></div>
      <div class="trust-stat">
        <span class="num">10K+</span>
        <span class="label">Satisfied customers</span>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-divider"></div>
      <div class="trust-stat">
        <span class="num">A+</span>
        <span class="label">BBB rating</span>
      </div>
      <div class="trust-divider"></div>
      <div class="trust-stat">
        <span class="num">2%</span>
        <span class="label">Master Elite</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-right" id="hero-right-col">
    <!-- gyro-wrap badge moved here by script below -->
    <div class="hero-credential">
      <span class="cred-title">GAF Presidents Club</span>
      <span class="cred-main">Award Winner</span>
      <span class="cred-sub">Only Recipient in Whatcom County</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROOF BAR -->
<div class="proof-bar">
  <div class="proof-item">Lifetime Warranty Options</div>
  <div class="proof-item">Free Estimates</div>
  <div class="proof-item">24/7 Emergency Repairs</div>
  <div class="proof-item">Financing Available</div>
  <div class="proof-item">Most Projects Completed in 1 Day</div>
</div>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section class="services-section" id="services">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="services-header">
      <div class="section-label">What we do</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Complete Exterior<br>Protection</h2>
      <p class="section-body">From a full roof replacement to new siding, gutters, windows, and decks — one trusted crew handles it all.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="services-grid">
      <div class="service-card">
        <span class="svc-icon">🏠</span>
        <div class="svc-name">Roofing</div>
        <div class="svc-desc">Replacement, repair, and new installation. Asphalt, metal, and flat roofing for residential and commercial.</div>
        <a href="#" class="svc-link">Learn more →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <span class="svc-icon">🏗️</span>
        <div class="svc-name">Siding</div>
        <div class="svc-desc">James Hardie fiber cement, CertainTeed vinyl, and wood-clad options built for the PNW climate.</div>
        <a href="#" class="svc-link">Learn more →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <span class="svc-icon">🌧️</span>
        <div class="svc-name">Gutters</div>
        <div class="svc-desc">Seamless gutter installation and replacement to protect your foundation from water damage.</div>
        <a href="#" class="svc-link">Learn more →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <span class="svc-icon">🪟</span>
        <div class="svc-name">Windows</div>
        <div class="svc-desc">Energy-efficient replacement windows designed to cut heat loss and stand up to Northwest weather.</div>
        <a href="#" class="svc-link">Learn more →</a>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <span class="svc-icon">🌲</span>
        <div class="svc-name">Decks</div>

</footer>

<script>
// ── FALLING SHINGLES ANIMATION ──
(function() {
  const canvas = document.getElementById('shingle-canvas');

  function resize() {
    canvas.width  = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  }
  resize();
  window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

  // Shingle types: label, base color, shadow color, highlight
  const shingleTypes = [
    { label:'Charcoal Architectural', base:'#3a3a3a', shadow:'#1a1a1a', hi:'#5a5a5a' },
    { label:'Weathered Wood',         base:'#7a6a4a', shadow:'#4a3a2a', hi:'#9a8a6a' },
    { label:'Barkwood',               base:'#5c4a2a', shadow:'#3a2a10', hi:'#7a6040' },
    { label:'Pewter Gray',            base:'#707878', shadow:'#404848', hi:'#909898' },
    { label:'Driftwood',              base:'#8a7a5a', shadow:'#5a4a2a', hi:'#aA9a7a' },
    { label:'Shakewood',              base:'#6a5040', shadow:'#3a2a18', hi:'#8a6858' },
    { label:'Slate Blue',             base:'#4a5870', shadow:'#2a3848', hi:'#6a7890' },
    { label:'Hickory',                base:'#4a3828', shadow:'#281808', hi:'#6a5040' },
  ];

  // Each shingle particle
  class Shingle {
    constructor() { this.reset(true); }

    reset(init) {
      const W = canvas.width;
      const H = canvas.height;
      this.type   = shingleTypes[Math.floor(Math.random() * shingleTypes.length)];
      this.w      = 110 + Math.random() * 90;  // width 110–200px full screen
      this.h      = this.w * 0.38;              // aspect ratio of a shingle tab
      this.x      = Math.random() * (W + 120) - 60;
      this.y      = init ? Math.random() * H * 1.5 - H * 0.5 : -this.h - 20;
      this.vy     = 0.8 + Math.random() * 1.6; // fall speed — weighted for large shingles
      this.vx     = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.6;
      this.angle  = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.45; // slight tilt radians
      this.spin   = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.008;
      this.alpha  = 0.18 + Math.random() * 0.15;
      this.scale  = 0.8 + Math.random() * 0.8;
      // Label fade — show shingle name briefly
      this.showLabel  = Math.random() > 0.45;
      this.labelAlpha = 0;
      this.labelPhase = 0; // 0=fadein 1=hold 2=fadeout
      this.labelTimer = 0;
    }

    draw(ctx) {
      ctx.save();
      ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha;
      ctx.translate(this.x, this.y);
      ctx.rotate(this.angle);
      ctx.scale(this.scale, this.scale);

      const w = this.w, h = this.h;

      // Drop shadow
      ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)';
      ctx.shadowBlur  = 8;
      ctx.shadowOffsetX = 3; ctx.shadowOffsetY = 5;

      // Main shingle body
      ctx.fillStyle = this.type.base;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.roundRect(-w/2, -h/2, w, h, 3);
      ctx.fill();

      ctx.shadowBlur = 0; ctx.shadowOffsetX = 0; ctx.shadowOffsetY = 0;

      // Texture lines (horizontal course lines)
      ctx.strokeStyle = this.type.shadow;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1;
      ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha * 0.6;
      for (let i = 1; i < 3; i++) {
        const ly = -h/2 + (h / 3) * i;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-w/2 + 4, ly);
        ctx.lineTo(w/2 - 4, ly);
        ctx.stroke();
      }

      // Highlight top edge
      ctx.strokeStyle = this.type.hi;
      ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
      ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha * 0.5;
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(-w/2 + 4, -h/2 + 2);
      ctx.lineTo(w/2 - 4, -h/2 + 2);
      ctx.stroke();

      // Label
      if (this.showLabel && this.labelAlpha > 0.01) {
        ctx.globalAlpha = this.alpha * this.labelAlpha;
        ctx.font = `bold ${Math.round(9 * this.scale)}px 'Barlow', sans-serif`;
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
        ctx.letterSpacing = '0.04em';
        ctx.fillText(this.type.label.toUpperCase(), 0, h/2 + 14 / this.scale);
      }

      ctx.restore();
    }

    update() {
      this.y     += this.vy;
      this.x     += this.vx;
      this.angle += this.spin;

      // Label lifecycle
      if (this.showLabel) {
        this.labelTimer++;
        if (this.labelPhase === 0) {
          this.labelAlpha = Math.min(1, this.labelAlpha + 0.025);
          if (this.labelAlpha >= 1) this.labelPhase = 1;
        } else if (this.labelPhase === 1) {
          if (this.labelTimer > 90) this.labelPhase = 2;
        } else {
          this.labelAlpha = Math.max(0, this.labelAlpha - 0.02);
        }
      }

      // Reset when off bottom
      if (this.y > canvas.height + 80) this.reset(false);
    }
  }

  // Spawn ~60 shingles staggered
  const shingles = [];
  const COUNT = 80;
  for (let i = 0; i < COUNT; i++) {
    const s = new Shingle();
    s.y = Math.random() * canvas.height; // spread initial positions
    shingles.push(s);
  }

  function animate() {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
    shingles.forEach(s => { s.update(); s.draw(ctx); });
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  }
  animate();
})();

// Move GAF Presidents Award badge from hero-left into hero-right
(function() {
  var gyro  = document.querySelector('.hero-left .gyro-wrap');
  var right = document.getElementById('hero-right-col');
  var cred  = right && right.querySelector('.hero-credential');
  if (gyro && right) {
    gyro.style.display = '';
    gyro.style.marginBottom = '2rem';
    right.insertBefore(gyro, cred);
  }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
